metadata.description: Clinical care gap rules for chronic disease management. Rules are evaluated against FHIR resources (Patient, Condition, Observation, MedicationRequest) to detect missing or overdue care.

risk_tier_thresholds.description: Determines patient risk tier based on total weighted gap score
risk_tier_thresholds.scoring_note: Each rule carries a severity_weight. A patient's total score is the sum of weights for all triggered (active) gaps.

condition_codes.description: SNOMED-CT and ICD-10 codes used to identify qualifying conditions in FHIR Condition resources

observation_codes.description: LOINC codes for lab results and clinical measurements used in Observation resources

fasting_glucose.display: Fasting glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

ldl_cholesterol.display: LDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

hdl_cholesterol.display: HDL Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

pap_smear.display: Microscopic observation in Cervix by Cyto stain

colorectal_screen.display: Noninvasive colorectal cancer DNA and occult blood screening

medication_codes.description: RxNorm codes for medication classes checked in MedicationRequest resources

rules.name: HbA1c Monitoring – Every 6 Months
rules.description: Patients with diabetes should have HbA1c measured at least every 6 months to assess glycemic control.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

evaluation.logic: Flag if no HbA1c observation exists within the last 180 days

thresholds.note: Flag separately if most recent HbA1c >= 9.0% (poor control)

rules.gap_message: No HbA1c test recorded in the last 6 months. Repeat testing is required for ongoing diabetes management.

rules.name: HbA1c Poor Control Flag
rules.description: Flag patients whose most recent HbA1c is >= 9.0%, indicating poor glycemic control.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

evaluation.logic: Flag if most recent HbA1c value is >= 9.0%

rules.gap_message: Most recent HbA1c is >= 9.0%, indicating poor glycemic control. Review medication regimen and patient adherence.

rules.name: Annual Urine Albumin-to-Creatinine Ratio (UACR)
rules.description: Annual UACR screening detects early diabetic nephropathy.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

evaluation.logic: Flag if no UACR observation exists within the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio (UACR) test in the last 12 months. Required annually for diabetic kidney disease screening.

rules.name: Annual eGFR Monitoring
rules.description: Annual eGFR measurement to monitor renal function in patients with diabetes.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

evaluation.logic: Flag if no eGFR observation within the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No eGFR measurement in the last 12 months. Annual renal function monitoring is required for patients with diabetes.

rules.name: Statin Therapy for Diabetes (Age 40–75)
rules.description: Patients aged 40–75 with diabetes should be on moderate- or high-intensity statin therapy to reduce cardiovascular risk, regardless of LDL level.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes; ACC/AHA Cholesterol Guidelines

evaluation.logic: Flag if no active statin MedicationRequest is present for an eligible patient

rules.gap_message: No active statin therapy found. Moderate- to high-intensity statin is recommended for patients with diabetes aged 40–75.

rules.name: Metformin First-Line Therapy for Type 2 Diabetes
rules.description: Metformin is the preferred initial pharmacologic agent for type 2 diabetes in the absence of contraindications.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

evaluation.logic: Flag if no active metformin or other antidiabetic agent is present. Note: absence may be acceptable if patient is on insulin or GLP-1/SGLT2 agents.

rules.gap_message: No antidiabetic medication (including metformin) found in active medications. Review treatment regimen for type 2 diabetes.

rules.name: Annual Dilated Eye Exam
rules.description: Annual ophthalmology exam to screen for diabetic retinopathy.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

evaluation.logic: Flag if no eye exam observation or encounter in the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No annual dilated eye exam recorded in the last 12 months. Required for diabetic retinopathy screening.

rules.name: Annual Comprehensive Foot Exam
rules.description: Annual foot exam to assess for peripheral neuropathy and vascular disease.
rules.clinical_guideline: ADA Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

evaluation.logic: Flag if no foot exam documented in the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No annual foot exam documented in the last 12 months. Required for early detection of diabetic neuropathy and peripheral vascular disease.

rules.name: Blood Pressure Monitoring – Every 6 Months
rules.description: Patients diagnosed with hypertension should have blood pressure recorded at least every 6 months.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no blood pressure observation within the last 180 days

rules.gap_message: No blood pressure recorded in the last 6 months for a patient with hypertension. Monitoring is required.

rules.name: Uncontrolled Blood Pressure Flag
rules.description: Flag patients with most recent blood pressure at Stage 2 hypertension levels (systolic >= 140 or diastolic >= 90).

evaluation.logic: Flag if most recent systolic BP >= 140 mmHg OR diastolic >= 90 mmHg

rules.gap_message: Most recent blood pressure meets Stage 2 hypertension criteria (>=140/90 mmHg). Medication review and lifestyle counseling recommended.

rules.name: ACE Inhibitor or ARB for Hypertension with CKD or Diabetes
rules.description: Patients with hypertension and either CKD or diabetes should be on an ACE inhibitor or ARB to provide nephroprotective benefit.
rules.clinical_guideline: KDIGO CKD Guidelines; ADA Standards of Medical Care

evaluation.logic: Flag if neither ACE inhibitor nor ARB is present in active medications for eligible patient

rules.gap_message: No ACE inhibitor or ARB found in active medications. Recommended for patients with hypertension plus CKD or diabetes.

rules.name: Statin Therapy for Established Cardiovascular Disease
rules.description: All patients with established cardiovascular disease (CAD or HF) should be on high-intensity statin therapy for secondary prevention.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no active statin present for patient with CAD or HF

rules.gap_message: No statin therapy found in a patient with established cardiovascular disease. High-intensity statin is indicated for secondary prevention.

rules.name: Beta-Blocker Therapy Post-Heart Failure
rules.description: Patients with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) should be on guideline-directed beta-blocker therapy.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no active beta-blocker present for patient with heart failure

rules.gap_message: No beta-blocker therapy found for a patient with heart failure. Guideline-directed beta-blocker therapy is recommended.

rules.name: Annual Lipid Panel
rules.description: Patients with cardiovascular risk factors should have a fasting lipid panel at least annually.
rules.clinical_guideline: ACC/AHA Cholesterol Guideline; ADA Standards of Medical Care

evaluation.logic: Flag if no total cholesterol or LDL observation within the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No lipid panel recorded in the last 12 months for a patient with cardiovascular risk factors.

rules.name: Annual Wellness Visit / Physical Exam
rules.description: All adult patients should have a documented annual wellness visit or preventive physical exam.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no preventive/wellness encounter type in the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No annual wellness visit or preventive physical exam documented in the last 12 months.

rules.name: Depression Screening (PHQ-2/PHQ-9)
rules.description: Annual depression screening using a validated tool (PHQ-2 or PHQ-9) for all adults.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no PHQ-2 or PHQ-9 observation in the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No depression screening (PHQ-2 or PHQ-9) documented in the last 12 months.

rules.name: Mammography Screening (Women Age 40–74)
rules.description: Biennial mammography screening for women aged 40–74 as per USPSTF.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no mammography observation in the last 730 days (2 years)

rules.gap_message: No mammography recorded in the last 2 years for an eligible female patient aged 40–74.

rules.name: Cervical Cancer Screening – Pap Smear (Women Age 21–65)
rules.description: Pap smear every 3 years (or Pap + HPV co-test every 5 years) for women aged 21–65.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no Pap smear observation in the last 1095 days (3 years)

rules.gap_message: No cervical cancer screening (Pap smear) recorded in the last 3 years for an eligible female patient.

rules.name: Colorectal Cancer Screening (Age 45–75)
rules.description: Colorectal cancer screening for adults aged 45–75. Fecal occult blood test annually or colonoscopy every 10 years.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no colorectal screening observation in the last 365 days (FOBT) or 3650 days (colonoscopy)

rules.gap_message: No colorectal cancer screening documented within the recommended interval for a patient aged 45–75.

rules.name: Bone Density Screening – DEXA (Women Age 65+)
rules.description: DEXA scan to screen for osteoporosis in women aged 65 and older.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no bone density (DEXA) observation in the last 730 days

rules.gap_message: No bone density screening (DEXA scan) documented in the last 2 years for an eligible female patient aged 65+.

rules.name: Annual Influenza Vaccination
rules.description: Annual influenza vaccination recommended for all persons 6 months and older.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no influenza immunization resource within the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No annual influenza vaccination recorded in the last 12 months.

rules.name: Pneumococcal Vaccination (Age 65+)
rules.description: PCV15 or PCV20 pneumococcal vaccination recommended for adults 65 and older.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no pneumococcal vaccination (PCV15 or PCV20) is present in immunization history for a patient aged 65+

rules.gap_message: No pneumococcal vaccination (PCV15 or PCV20) documented for a patient aged 65 or older.

rules.name: COVID-19 Vaccination – Up to Date
rules.description: Adults should be up to date with COVID-19 vaccinations per current CDC guidance.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no COVID-19 immunization within the last 365 days (current booster guidance)

rules.gap_message: COVID-19 vaccination may not be up to date. Review current CDC booster recommendations.

rules.name: Shingles (Zoster) Vaccination (Age 50+)
rules.description: Recombinant zoster vaccine (RZV / Shingrix) 2-dose series recommended for adults aged 50+.

evaluation.logic: Flag if fewer than 2 doses of RZV are documented for a patient aged 50+

rules.gap_message: Shingles (Shingrix) vaccination series is incomplete or missing for a patient aged 50 or older.

rules.name: BMI Documented at Annual Visit
rules.description: Body mass index (BMI) should be calculated and documented at least annually.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no BMI observation within the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: No BMI recorded in the last 12 months.

rules.name: Obesity – Weight Management Referral
rules.description: Patients with documented obesity (BMI >= 30) should have evidence of weight management counseling or referral.

evaluation.logic: Flag if BMI >= 30 and no weight management referral or behavioral counseling is documented in the last 365 days

rules.gap_message: Patient has obesity (BMI >= 30) with no documented weight management counseling or referral in the last 12 months.

rules.name: Annual Potassium Monitoring for CKD
rules.description: Patients with CKD should have serum potassium monitored at least annually due to risk of hyperkalemia.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no serum potassium observation within the last 180 days for a CKD patient

rules.gap_message: No serum potassium measurement in the last 6 months for a patient with CKD.

rules.name: Annual eGFR Monitoring for CKD
rules.description: Patients with CKD should have eGFR monitored at least every 6 months to track disease progression.

evaluation.logic: Flag if no eGFR observation within the last 180 days for a CKD patient

rules.gap_message: No eGFR measurement in the last 6 months for a patient with CKD. Regular monitoring required to track disease progression.
